descriptions.description:
This image shows the p5.js Web Editor interface, featuring a code editor on the left and a preview pane on the right.

**Code (HTML):**
```html
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html>
<head>
  <script src="https://cdnjs.cloudflare.com/ajax/libs/p5.js/1.11.1/p5.min.js"></script>
  <script src="https://cdnjs.cloudflare.com/ajax/libs/p5.sound.min.js"></script>
  <link rel="stylesheet" type="text/css" href="style.css">
  <meta charset="utf-8">
</head>
<body>
  <main></main>
  <script src="UFO.js"></script>
  <script src="sketch.js"></script>
</body>
</html>
```

**Visual output:**
The preview pane displays a dark blue background with several stylized, layered clouds in shades of grey and white. The clouds are arranged horizontally across the canvas.

**UI state:**
The application is the p5.js Web Editor, with `index.html` as the active file tab. The sidebar shows a file list including `UFO.js`, `index.html`, `sketch.js`, and `style.css`. A console area is visible at the bottom, currently empty.

This screen shows the p5.js Web Editor interface with a file sidebar, a code editor, and a preview pane.

**Code (HTML):**
```html
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html>
<html lang="en">
  ...</html>
```

**Visual output:**
The preview pane on the right displays a dark navy blue background with several stylized, pixelated clouds in shades of light and dark purple. The clouds are arranged in horizontal rows across the canvas.

**UI state:**
The application is the p5.js Web Editor. The active file in the editor is `index.html`. Other files listed in the sidebar are `UFO.js`, `sketch.js`, and `style.css`. The console at the bottom shows a repeating string of text: `(80) [UFO, UFO, UFO, UFO, UFO, UFO, UFO, UFO, ... ]`.

This screen shows the p5.js Web Editor interface, featuring a code editor on the left and a preview pane on the right.

**Code (HTML):**
```html
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html>
<head>
  <script src="https://cdnjs.cloudflare.com/ajax/libs/p5.js/1.11.1/p5.min.js"></script>
  <script src="https://cdnjs.cloudflare.com/ajax/libs/p5.js/1.11.1/addons/p5.sound.min.js"></script>
  <link rel="stylesheet" type="text/css" href="style.css">
  <meta charset="utf-8" />
</head>
<body>
  <main>
  </main>
  <script src="UFO.js"></script>
  <script src="sketch.js"></script>
</body>
</html>
```

**Visual output:**
The preview pane displays a dark blue background filled with several stylized, layered clouds in shades of light and medium blue.

**UI state:**
The application is the p5.js Web Editor, with `index.html` currently selected in the file sidebar. The console at the bottom shows a repetitive log of the text "[UFO, UFO, UFO...]" preceded by "(80)".

This screen shows the p5.js Web Editor interface, featuring a code editor on the left and a preview canvas on the right.

**Code (HTML):**
```html
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html>
<head>
<script src="https://cdnjs.cloudflare.com/ajax/libs/p5.js/1.11.1/p5.js"></script>
<script src="https://cdnjs.cloudflare.com/ajax/libs/p5.js/1.11.1/addons/p5.sound.min.js"></script>
<link rel="stylesheet" type="text/css" href="style.css">
<meta charset="utf-8">
</head>
<body>
<main>
</main>
<script src="sketch.js"></script>
</body>
</html>
```

**Visual output:**
The preview area displays a dark blue background with several stylized, layered clouds in shades of light and medium blue.

**UI state:**
The application is the p5.js Web Editor, with `index.html` currently selected in the file sidebar. A console at the bottom shows a repetitive log of `[UFO, UFO, UFO, ...]` and indicates 80 entries.

This screen shows the p5.js Web Editor interface with an HTML file open and a visual preview active.

**Code:**
The following code is visible in the `index.html` file:
```html
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">
<head>
<script src="https://cdnjs.cloudflare.com/ajax/libs/p5.js/1.11.1/p5.min.js"></script>
<script src="https://cdnjs.cloudflare.com/ajax/libs/p5.sound.min.js"></script>
<link rel="stylesheet" type="text/css" href="style.css">
</head>
<body>
<main>
</main>
<script src="UFO.js"></script>
<script src="sketch.js"></script>
</body>
</html>
```

**Visual output:**
The preview area on the right displays a dark blue background with several stylized, layered clouds in shades of purple and light blue.

**UI state:**
The application is the p5.js Web Editor, with `index.html` as the active tab in the file sidebar. The console at the bottom shows a repeating sequence of text: `(80) [UFO, UFO, UFO, UFO, UFO, UFO, UFO, UFO, ... ]`.
